questions.question: Explain how PWM controls the speed of a DC motor and list three key PWM parameters.
expectedPoints: PWM works by rapidly switching power on/off

questions.question: Describe the complete process of interfacing a microcontroller with a DC motor using an H-bridge driver, including circuit design and programming considerations.
expectedPoints: H-bridge circuit configuration and working principle
Microcontroller GPIO setup for direction control
Software implementation for speed and direction control
